About
Movies
Criticism
Events
  • Friday 6 Dec 2019, NYU  Isiah Medina, “Remembering the Future” - Lecture (Hosted by Kinet)
  • Saturday 21 Dec 2019, Deptford Cinema  Nanterre Personne by Angelina Battais, Breaking and Entering / Rained Last Night / Late Embryo / Shooting Star Summer Solstice by Kelley Dong, Eden is a Cave by Alexandre Galmard, 88:88 by Isiah Medina
  • Saturday 11 Apr 2020, Twitch  Isiah Medina, Masterclass for Berlin Revolution
  • Sunday 6 Sep 2020, Garage Museum of Contemporary Art (Moscow)  Inventing the Future screening + discussion with film critic Alexey Artamonov, art historian Boris Klyushnikov, and philosopher Nikita Sazonov on the problems of transferring philosophical texts to the screen, the ideas of left-wing accelerationism, and the aesthetics of Isiah Medina.
  • Saturday 27 Feb 2021, Cineteca Madrid  Inventing the Future screening
  • Thursday 3 Jun 2021, Ruskin School of Art, University of Oxford  “Towards a Theory of Film Production” a lecture by Isiah Medina
  • Monday 12 Jul 2021, Museum of Modern Art of Odessa, Ukraine  Inventing the Future screening, via Muzeon Experimental Centre
  • Saturday 17 Jul 2021, Spectacle Theatre  Worlds theatrical premiere
  • Thursday 22 Jul 2021, Typography Centre For Contemporary Art, Russia  Inventing the Future screening
  • Tuesday 28 Sep 2021, Massachussetts College of Art and Design  Isiah Medina in dialogue with the MassArt Ciné-Culture audience about his work
